text:
Peter Hawkins wrote:
> 
> Synopsis: [PATCH - MFC] for 'mail'
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: thepish
> State-Changed-When: Thu Oct 15 16:24:06 PDT 1998
> State-Changed-Why:
> I corrected this in current (separate PR) less than a week ago. Not yet
> ready to merge to stable - will do after the freeze

	The whole point of this PR was to make sure that there is a reminder
for the MFC, thus the "MFC" in the synopsis. Please re-open this PR and
leave it open till the merge is done. 

Thanks,

Doug
